scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/shared-types test && corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/agent-runtime test && corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/api test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/shared-types typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/agent-runtime typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @proof-of-vault/web typecheck
